title: Many Dubai expats fled as the war in the Middle East escalated. Those that stayed say life is 'functioning but tense'
summary_full: Iran has launched a volley of drone and missiles in the Middle East, including against the UAE, following U.S.-Israeli strikes on the country.
summary_public: Iran has launched a volley of drone and missiles in the Middle East, including against the UAE, following U.S.-Israeli strikes on the country.
